mapper.select: select rights_template_id as rightsTemplateId, rights_name as rightsName, rights_type as rightsType, quota_mode as quotaMode, quota_value as quotaValue, valid_days as validDays, writeoff_mode as writeoffMode from jst_rights_template where del_flag = '0' and status = 1 and (applicable_role = #{applicableRole} or applicable_role = 'all' or applicable_role like concat('%', #{applicableRole}, '%')) order by rights_template_id asc
